overall.description: Game engine footage from a first-person driving perspective following an RV camper van through a suburban area. The vehicle drives through commercial streets with retail buildings, stops at a traffic intersection, executes a right turn, and continues through residential neighborhoods with single-family homes and parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with retail buildings and signage

agents.ego_description: driving straight following an RV camper van through a commercial street with shops visible on both sides

notable_agents.action: white RV camper van driving steadily ahead in the same lane

yellow commercial building with BANCA signage on the upper facade
metal chain link fence running along the right sidewalk
tall grey concrete barrier wall on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving straight through a commercial suburban street following an RV camper van. The scene features retail buildings including a yellow BANCA building and a liquor store sign on the left, with a concrete wall and chain link fence on the right. The road is clear with sparse traffic and no pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: traffic intersection with signal lights and crosswalks

events.description: approaching intersection with red traffic light visible ahead
stopping behind the RV at the red traffic light
executing a right turn at the intersection following the RV

agents.ego_description: stopping at a red traffic light at an intersection, waiting for cross traffic to clear, then turning right

notable_agents.action: RV camper van stopped at the red light then proceeding through the right turn
black pickup truck crossing the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red light
red brick industrial building with large windows at the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a traffic intersection, stops at a red light behind the RV, and waits while a black pickup truck crosses from the left. After the light changes, the vehicle follows the RV through a right turn. A red industrial building is visible on the right corner of the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with single-family homes and parked vehicles

events.description: transitioning from commercial intersection into residential neighborhood with houses

agents.ego_description: driving straight through residential streets following the RV, passing houses with front yards and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: RV camper van continuing to drive ahead on the residential road

entered.detail: single-story wooden house with weathered blue-grey siding and a front porch
white house with wooden picket fence running along the sidewalk
white boat mounted on a trailer parked on the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a quiet residential neighborhood with single-family homes, wooden fences, and mature trees lining the street. The RV continues ahead as the vehicle passes a boat on a trailer parked on the left and various houses with front yards. The environment shifts from commercial to purely residential with moderate vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle tracks an RV camper van from a commercial suburban strip into a quiet residential neighborhood. It begins by driving straight past retail storefronts, including a yellow BANCA building and a liquor store, while a concrete wall and chain link fence line the right side of the road. As the vehicle approaches a traffic intersection, it comes to a halt behind the RV to let a black pickup truck cross before following the van through a right turn past a red industrial building. The scene then shifts from the commercial zone into a peaceful residential area characterized by single-family homes, wooden fences, and mature trees. Finally, the camera glides past a boat on a trailer and various front yards as the environment settles into a suburban landscape with moderate vegetation.
